response: Spaceware Sky Division II is manufactured by Ordos City China Science Flying Universe Science and Technology Co., Ltd., which is one of the twelve major subdivisions of Inner Mongolia, China. This subsidiary, located in Ordos, is a subsidiary of Beijing Sky Universe Digital City Science and Technology Co., Ltd. (Spaceware, 北京天宇数字城市科技有限公司), and is involved in the production of UAVs.
